task:
Seed the two local-default memory files into the workspace template so a freshly scaffolded repo inherits both defaults. Two files, write-scope = templates/workspace-cocoder/cocoder/memory/** only.

(A) Replace the stub templates/workspace-cocoder/cocoder/memory/tech-stack.md (currently just '# Tech stack (stub)') with the canonical preferred tech stack as the LOCAL DEFAULT for new repos. Required content: languages, frameworks, test runner, build tooling, lint/format, with PINNED VERSIONS. CRITICAL: every version must be sourced from THIS repo's own live config — read package.json (root and packages/*), tsconfig*.json, the vitest config, and the lockfile (pnpm-lock.yaml) and quote the actual installed/declared versions. Do NOT invent or guess any version. Give a short (one-line) rationale per major choice. End with the resolution-rule note: 'Resolution: a workspace that specifies its own value wins; otherwise this local default applies. This file is seeded create-only into each scaffolded repo's cocoder/memory/ and is never overwritten once a workspace has its own.'

(B) Create templates/workspace-cocoder/cocoder/memory/design-spec.md as a SHORT POINTER (not a copy) to the single owner at packages/ui/src/renderer/styles/design-spec.md. It must: state that the CoCoder dashboard design language (color/type/spacing tokens + component patterns) is the local-default design spec for new UI; point to packages/ui/src/renderer/styles/design-spec.md as the one authoritative owner; and carry the same resolution-rule note (workspace-specified CSS/design wins; otherwise this default applies; seeded create-only, never overwritten). Do NOT re-copy the token tables or CSS — keep packages/ui/.../design-spec.md as the sole owner.

Acceptance criteria: both files exist under templates/workspace-cocoder/cocoder/memory/; tech-stack.md contains real versions traceable to this repo's config files (no stub text remains, no invented versions); design-spec.md is a pointer (under ~30 lines, no duplicated token tables); each file carries the workspace-wins resolution note. Must not break: do not edit packages/ui/src/renderer/styles/design-spec.md (it stays the owner), do not touch scaffold code, do not write outside templates/workspace-cocoder/cocoder/memory/.
